title: Shimriyth #8116
definition:
Shimrith = "vigilant"

 1) a Moabitess, mother of Jehozabad, one of the assassins of king
    Joash of Judah
nasbUsage:

 1) a Moabitess, mother of Jehozabad, one of the assassins of king
    Joash of Judah

    NASB:  a Moabite woman
